name: Parallel Jaw Gripper (PG-50)
description: A pneumatic parallel jaw gripper with adjustable grip force. Suitable for picking rigid objects of various sizes.

name: Vacuum Suction Cup Gripper (VS-4)
description: A vacuum-based suction gripper with four cups for handling flat and smooth objects like boxes, sheets, and panels.

name: Soft Robotic Gripper (SG-3F)
description: A three-finger soft pneumatic gripper that adapts to irregular object shapes. Safe for handling delicate and fragile items.

name: Peristaltic Pump (PP-100)
description: A peristaltic pump for precise dispensing of liquids, adhesives, and pastes. The fluid only contacts the tubing, ensuring cleanliness.

name: Spray Nozzle Assembly (SN-P2)
description: An electronically controlled spray nozzle for painting, coating, and cleaning applications. Adjustable spray pattern and flow rate.

name: Rotary Cutting Tool (RC-D10)
description: A high-speed rotary cutting tool for trimming, deburring, and machining operations. Includes spindle speed control.

name: MIG Welding Torch (WT-M200)
description: A robotic MIG welding torch for automated welding of steel and aluminium. Includes wire feed and gas shielding.

name: Magnetic Stirrer End-Effector (MS-E1)
description: A motorised stirring attachment for mixing liquids in laboratory and food processing applications.

name: Adaptive Finger Gripper (AF-2D)
description: A two-finger electric gripper with force feedback for controlled grasping. Each finger has independent position control.
